mandate: MANDATE: Correct inter-process communication (Mojo), process lifecycle
management, and privilege separation in the multi-process host
architecture. TONE: Zero Preamble. No conversational filler. Artifacts

mojo_ipc_security: Secure Mojo interfaces and restrict access to trusted processes.
process_privileges: Each process must run with the minimum necessary privileges.
platform_server_names: Be aware of platform-specific server names (e.g. `AgentProcessBroker`
